textByHash.08135b2f238b429c6ce6781b84d13dad3aece811: This isn't true! Someone must have set me up!
textByHash.0b3c9f56f986a70b128ebaacab957fa068f15405: Ah, now that's going to be a problem.
textByHash.0b86aec85764802e628afb2fad9ad8172b4d706d: Brand new here and already working for the Prince... Strange.
textByHash.0bce72c0734b198d9cd1518160b8f7e606625277: Not great... Can you believe what they've done?
textByHash.0f1ac26b95e8d07b475cbc0c4c2b797f9c89af40: Can we have a break? I'm feeling a bit iffy...
textByHash.1df188ebc626296ef8fa616d7e1a23597da6b9f6: Hmm... You look like you know a thing or two. You can take his place.
textByHash.2372da14fe4a975c46e913e3a2ec665cce302d52: With the recent opening of the kingdom, the cothon has become much busier. Good for business of course, but not so good when it comes to smugglers.
textByHash.26fbdaafc355e26fc71f311400b617906a895ee4: Ohh, this is tiring. I think I need a quick break.
textByHash.2984d7bc05cadd2f99450f1efc6f3c8dbaf603af: This day is the worst. Fine, I'll head over there soon.
textByHash.2d14c0a27cfb7b182fe45a3c1102314290579f07: Beat them at their own game. Go looking through a few pockets.
textByHash.2e686f8aff3198713900c1dc5e956bea4fa8106d: It was those others! Those undead druids. Blind moon worshippers...
textByHash.2fb3bc8a41a18c6ae2ca06c4b736cd27cb3e72dc: So you feel it too? A shadow hangs over this place.
textByHash.30fa98b9e92798662ed805bf5c5a527355e1493a: I see. I think I shall check out this ruin. Thank you for letting me know adventurer.
textByHash.36aea2ff337ef4acc510d5906557bcc404558b8a: You fought well in there. I should train with you more often.
textByHash.37095591295ff32222d016062bf550d6774aaa0d: Thought so. Be off with you.
textByHash.389c1ef39dafbfbb4a1045716ae4fc727553bb42: Nilsal, adventurer. I'll be returning to the palace soon.
textByHash.394f13f0db7f104c6281381d8a4d72c4553fce12: You don't work for the palace. Why would they send you?
textByHash.3f54b6f0e40a8c290b2e5b34c58c2cf02fab4c5a: Nilsal. Thanks for helping out with that little issue. I'll be heading over to the palace soon.
textByHash.4f865819366c567ecd06a9aa6484a52e34071023: Hello again. I'll be returning to the palace shortly.
textByHash.4fd26d291dd78edcef0892e873ec2bec182bb27a: Hmm... Well we're not going anywhere until our work here is done. If you want us back at the palace, you'd best help.
textByHash.524e1ac9859e0600c8ebcbd391bc136166a06a3a: Sorry, but I'm waiting for someone.
textByHash.591ffdf3d0a7fad12c86ece3937e0cafb35a4cdb: I'll be here once you're ready.
textByHash.5e96470794d7274322039440c4c58554e25e61f4: Find the amulet and tell us who was carrying it. We can then follow them right to the rest of their group.
textByHash.6fdd4a2d72f1153fd107c3841d5e970fc4cc1037: Oh, and bring two attack styles in with you. I want some variety, and it will help me test my faith in Ralos.
textByHash.70a7d7e026cecb198659c42a1460889371c9c4f1: I told you not to have that last one. Look at you!
textByHash.743f8e49b0fac83579ad5ccb873938e610d40591: Huh... Fair enough. I'm happy to return to the palace, but I can't until I've finished my work here.
textByHash.77c5449ffb38197bcd6d0610daf56dbb7b8de82b: Best you get to it then.
textByHash.7af756d4c5aaf1e38fe2ee37351f53d4f03c2462: Well then come back when you can.
textByHash.7cbed6c041545681152b36634a7ce97dacac4181: We'll be there once the thieves are dealt with. It won't take us long.
textByHash.85a2ba029b4625c1f2e61d901171fe880614135b: Azali here can't go showing up to the palace in this state. We need to sober her up.
textByHash.8cd4be3a6cc0206ebe819c971e7df36661117ea9: My mission is still a secret, adventurer. Perhaps I'll share it with you one day.
textByHash.8de366aaf8677745bbbe3a26b93fe71660b5f8e8: Do you see what they've become? That's what turning your back on the light does. Even as I stand here in this desecrated temple, I feel the light fading from me.
textByHash.8fe4c4e9c1d55b5a9852e411a556cb2d97de55b9: Are you blind? Look what they've done to the altar of Ralos!
textByHash.92aa629769b7373b5a0fb0897bd7d5644f5fd553: Ohh... We're going somewhere new? How exciting!
textByHash.94ac043af991fce620dab4f6a33f328cf420c481: The crate should be on the docks rather than on a ship. It's of a standard size and isn't part of a stack. It's directly next to two barrels of fish and opposite a bench.
textByHash.983e0fe0b7d2b66c71ae5722b594e7b7c7cfcdc0: Are you ready to train? Remember, bring two attack styles in with you. It will help me test my faith in Ralos.
textByHash.997fefe5e0dbdc0c23fabb0ad085c00a95f4ba39: Well rules are rules, I'm afraid. Without proof, I can't take any orders from you.
textByHash.9bad83cd972350219ea9650c3f934dcabce0ef5c: There's one outside the gates just to the east of here... But how does a fountain help?
textByHash.9e761cdae65de4fb6716cc2f03b3d9885a097e93: I'm afraid you must accept my secrecy adventurer, for who knows what the future holds.
textByHash.a21251106262cb24329c688404cb795e134ae994: To the south, beyond Mount Quidamortem. It's a glorious land where the sun forever shines.
textByHash.ae4ed882200dedf5aaa84a16e3d2c1fcc73d105c: A band of thieves has been active here recently, but we came up with a way to track them down. We planted a nice shiny amulet on one of the stalls. Sure enough, it was stolen soon after.
textByHash.af68e28436abe5a79cd0cd2f4b827b0cf5b688ec: This isn't the right way! I'm going back to the pub!
textByHash.b668a8c20ed15f7bc03815a0b1f98a43cd93c68f: Should you not pick up your follower first?
textByHash.b7a61c8c72e21ace6107250fe77a989beb1c5c67: Call me Astra! Now, I must see this discovery for myself. It may well help with my mission here. May the light shine upon you!
textByHash.b93f9a04b95ba3aa4b70820aeed9a6663b9e2299: Oh, pray tell, where is this temple?
textByHash.bc7df1bdc02c689995eedc260380fb8667d511b1: I'm a Knight of Varlamore, the Kingdom of Sun. I venture to Kourend on a mission, one I can say very little of.
textByHash.c1aac0e002038a66dec4c38a3d1c00871d2a8ad0: If you can find the crate of weapons and tell me what ship it's from, I'll be able to return to the palace much faster.
textByHash.c5989a342778b814c910b63b0a5530133c3e22b7: Good work. He'll lead us right to those thieves.
textByHash.ccc93198a98254f171609e91d181d648f391b3ec: You're working for the Tullus twins? Do you have proof?
textByHash.ccced2d2984c2856da8e58658b11724748a95002: If that were so, you'd have proof.
textByHash.ce412481597e2cec3b3a6ce760a09f3f0282ce23: Not long. We'll be there as soon as the thieves are dealt with.
textByHash.d090cc9d4483c2b39f3b147e3a6709c8165ce768: I thought you were going to that fountain. It's just outside the gates to the east of here.
textByHash.d190eb828938b5c26e3e6c0ecf1421b8f0deee66: You say that now, but there's no shortage of crates around here. Thankfully, the tip-off did give us some information that might help you find it.
textByHash.d1d9d4c174cd307bc78efbb3a27adae5e903aa40: We've had a tip-off that there's a ship here involved in weapons smuggling, but we don't know which one.
textByHash.e2d17aa7a8d81d2b1b8867ed27dc66f1edbcc6fe: Yes! Join me in the colosseum for some training. Once we're done, I'll return to the palace.
textByHash.e4ee2bd6e1c6ff89127bc80eeb67f5121afb808a: Yes, I'll head over there shortly.
textByHash.e9a286d8257822f7a27074d77292ed871f398faa: If you are, then prove it.
textByHash.f5435dc58542bbee180c9623787e3ac429aafccd: And I'll return there... eventually. First, I'm here for some training, but it seems my training partner is a no show.
textByHash.f6d711432510b70d4da91e8af6dd8ffebe21a70d: Perfect! That's my work here done then. I'll return to the palace shortly. Timoiva!
textByHash.fd928b7b59d7a2c2b3067eca62bed5514940c066: Report? I don't think so! It's our day off!
textByHash.ff2ef2c44289aa94ec85299d20a6ab8492b8a5dc: Don't worry, I'll be on my way to the palace soon.
